introSection: Tulireki (lit. 'Fire Sleigh') is a roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Finland. It is Kalevala featured, just like Salama.
fullText:
Tulireki (lit. 'Fire Sleigh') is a roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Finland. It is Kalevala featured, just like Salama.


 * On-ride video
